name: Hydrating Facial Cleanser
description: A gentle, non-foaming cleanser with ceramides and hyaluronic acid to help restore the skin barrier without stripping moisture.

name: Revitalift 1.5% Hyaluronic Acid Serum
description: A lightweight serum that helps visibly plump skin and reduce the appearance of fine lines with hyaluronic acid.

name: Micellar Cleansing Water
description: All-in-one cleanser and makeup remover that leaves skin refreshed with no rinse required.

name: Advanced Genifique Serum
description: A youth-activating serum formulated to improve radiance and skin smoothness with continued use.

name: True Match Nude Tinted Serum
description: A hybrid formula combining lightweight coverage and hydrating care for a natural luminous finish.

name: Lash Sensational Sky High Mascara
description: Lengthening and volumizing mascara designed for lifted lashes and all-day wear.

name: All Soft Shampoo
description: A nourishing shampoo with argan oil that helps soften and smooth dry, brittle hair.

name: Elixir Ultime Hair Oil Serum
description: A multi-use hair oil serum for shine, softness, and frizz control across different hair routines.

name: Black Opium Eau de Parfum
description: A warm, captivating fragrance profile blending coffee accord, vanilla, and white florals.
